mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sale_order_entry ( fbillno, fbcykc, f_sfxp, f_jqhx, fplanmaterialid, fplanmaterialname, fplanunitid, fqty, fmaterialpriceunitqty, fmaterialpriceunitid, fprice, ftaxprice, fentrytaxrate, fentrytaxamount, fallamount, fbasecanoutqty, fdeliqty, fstockbasecanoutqty, f_ora_text1, f_ora_date3, f_fzr, f_ora_text, f_ora_date1, f_ora_date2, fpurjoinqty, f_ora_base1, f_ycjjfa, f_ora_decimal, f_ora_date4, f_ora_decimal1, f_ora_integer2, f_ora_date5, f_ora_integer3, f_bzjdtwo, f_ora_base, f_ora_integer, f_ora_date, f_mz, f_jz, f_mzz, f_zxs, f_xs, f_gdtp1, f_gdtp2, f_xdgjjdtwo, f_bzfs, f_tsyq, f_ljrksl, fysbz, f_bgrq, f_ctt, f_cptp, f_gcbz, fhhwrk, f_kpdj, f_bzxdzt, f_gxzt, f_cht, f_jgt, f_smsfj, f_bchqzt, f_tsl, f_bgywpm, f_bgdw, f_ygcb, f_hsbm, f_sbys, f_bcfynew, f_glbcfynew, fbzcc, fbzgctg, frkshrq, fbjr, ftpr, f_cty_baseproperty4, fkhywms, f_cty_baseproperty6, f_ygcbdj, f_ygcbdj1, f_ygcb1, f_peuu_attachment_83g, fcgddshrq, fyjsj, fslshrq, f_xlcp, f_cplb, f_ckrq, f_cty_baseproperty7, f_cty_baseproperty8 ) VALUES ( #{fbillNo}, #{fBcykc}, #{fSfxp}, #{fJqhx}, #{fPlanMaterialId}, #{fPlanMaterialName}, #{fPlanUnitId}, #{fQty}, #{fMaterialPriceUnitQty}, #{fMaterialPriceUnitID}, #{fPrice}, #{fTaxPrice}, #{fEntryTaxRate}, #{fEntryTaxAmount}, #{fAllAmount}, #{fBaseCanOutQty}, #{fDeliQty}, #{fStockBaseCanOutQty}, #{fOraText1}, #{fOraDate3}, #{fFzr}, #{fOraText}, #{fOraDate1}, #{fOraDate2}, #{fPurJoinQty}, #{fOraBase1}, #{fYcjjfa}, #{fOraDecimal}, #{fOraDate4}, #{fOraDecimal1}, #{fOraInteger2}, #{fOraDate5}, #{fOraInteger3}, #{fBzjdTwo}, #{fOraBase}, #{fOraInteger}, #{fOraDate}, #{fmz}, #{fjz}, #{fmzz}, #{fzxs}, #{fxs}, #{fGdtp1}, #{fGdtp2}, #{fXdgjjdTwo}, #{fBzfs}, #{fTsyq}, #{fljrksl}, #{fYsbz}, #{fBgrq}, #{fCtt}, #{fCptp}, #{fGcbz}, #{fHhwrk}, #{fKpdj}, #{fBzxdzt}, #{fGxzt}, #{fCht}, #{fjgt}, #{fSmsfj}, #{fBchqzt}, #{fTsl}, #{fBgywpm}, #{fBgdw}, #{fYgcb}, #{fHsbm}, #{fSbys}, #{fBcfyNew}, #{fGlbcfyNew}, #{fbzcc}, #{fbzgctg}, #{frkshrq}, #{fBjr}, #{fTpr}, #{fCtyBaseProperty4}, #{fKhywms}, #{fCtyBaseProperty6}, #{fYgcbdj}, #{fYgcbdj1}, #{fYgcb1}, #{fPeuuAttachment83g}, #{fCgddshrq}, #{fYjsj}, #{fSlshrq}, #{fXlcp}, #{fCplb}, #{fCkrq}, #{fCtyBaseProperty7}, #{fCtyBaseProperty8} )

INSERT INTO t_sale_order_entry ( fbillno, fbcykc, f_sfxp, f_jqhx, fplanmaterialid, fplanmaterialname, fplanunitid, fqty, fmaterialpriceunitqty, fmaterialpriceunitid, fprice, ftaxprice, fentrytaxrate, fentrytaxamount, fallamount, fbasecanoutqty, fdeliqty, fstockbasecanoutqty, f_ora_text1, f_ora_date3, f_fzr, f_ora_text, f_ora_date1, f_ora_date2, fpurjoinqty, f_ora_base1, f_ycjjfa, f_ora_decimal, f_ora_date4, f_ora_decimal1, f_ora_integer2, f_ora_date5, f_ora_integer3, f_bzjdtwo, f_ora_base, f_ora_integer, f_ora_date, f_mz, f_jz, f_mzz, f_zxs, f_xs, f_gdtp1, f_gdtp2, f_xdgjjdtwo, f_bzfs, f_tsyq, f_ljrksl, fysbz, f_bgrq, f_ctt, f_cptp, f_gcbz, fhhwrk, f_kpdj, f_bzxdzt, f_gxzt, f_cht, f_jgt, f_smsfj, f_bchqzt, f_tsl, f_bgywpm, f_bgdw, f_ygcb, f_hsbm, f_sbys, f_bcfynew, f_glbcfynew, fbzcc, fbzgctg, frkshrq, fbjr, ftpr, f_cty_baseproperty4, fkhywms, f_cty_baseproperty6, f_ygcbdj, f_ygcbdj1, f_ygcb1, f_peuu_attachment_83g, fcgddshrq, fyjsj, fslshrq, f_xlcp, f_cplb, f_ckrq, f_cty_baseproperty7, f_cty_baseproperty8 ) VALUES
( #{item.fbillNo}, #{item.fBcykc}, #{item.fSfxp}, #{item.fJqhx}, #{item.fPlanMaterialId}, #{item.fPlanMaterialName}, #{item.fPlanUnitId}, #{item.fQty}, #{item.fMaterialPriceUnitQty}, #{item.fMaterialPriceUnitID}, #{item.fPrice}, #{item.fTaxPrice}, #{item.fEntryTaxRate}, #{item.fEntryTaxAmount}, #{item.fAllAmount}, #{item.fBaseCanOutQty}, #{item.fDeliQty}, #{item.fStockBaseCanOutQty}, #{item.fOraText1}, #{item.fOraDate3}, #{item.fFzr}, #{item.fOraText}, #{item.fOraDate1}, #{item.fOraDate2}, #{item.fPurJoinQty}, #{item.fOraBase1}, #{item.fYcjjfa}, #{item.fOraDecimal}, #{item.fOraDate4}, #{item.fOraDecimal1}, #{item.fOraInteger2}, #{item.fOraDate5}, #{item.fOraInteger3}, #{item.fBzjdTwo}, #{item.fOraBase}, #{item.fOraInteger}, #{item.fOraDate}, #{item.fmz}, #{item.fjz}, #{item.fmzz}, #{item.fzxs}, #{item.fxs}, #{item.fGdtp1}, #{item.fGdtp2}, #{item.fXdgjjdTwo}, #{item.fBzfs}, #{item.fTsyq}, #{item.fljrksl}, #{item.fYsbz}, #{item.fBgrq}, #{item.fCtt}, #{item.fCptp}, #{item.fGcbz}, #{item.fHhwrk}, #{item.fKpdj}, #{item.fBzxdzt}, #{item.fGxzt}, #{item.fCht}, #{item.fjgt}, #{item.fSmsfj}, #{item.fBchqzt}, #{item.fTsl}, #{item.fBgywpm}, #{item.fBgdw}, #{item.fYgcb}, #{item.fHsbm}, #{item.fSbys}, #{item.fBcfyNew}, #{item.fGlbcfyNew}, #{item.fbzcc}, #{item.fbzgctg}, #{item.frkshrq}, #{item.fBjr}, #{item.fTpr}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty4}, #{item.fKhywms}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty6}, #{item.fYgcbdj}, #{item.fYgcbdj1}, #{item.fYgcb1}, #{item.fPeuuAttachment83g}, #{item.fCgddshrq}, #{item.fYjsj}, #{item.fSlshrq}, #{item.fXlcp}, #{item.fCplb}, #{item.fCkrq}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty7}, #{item.fCtyBaseProperty8} )
